agribalyse.name_en: Dark chocolate bar, less than 70% cocoa
agribalyse.name_fr: Chocolat noir à moins de 70% de cacao, à croquer, tablette

ingredients_text: Dark Chocolate (98%) (cacao kernel from cacao beans (origin: Ecuador, organic), sugar, cacao butter, cacao minimum 62%), ground coffee (2%), ground cardamon (<1%). Allergen advice: See ingredients in bold. May contain traces of milk, nuts, wheat.
